content: Absolutely love the new dashboard — finally see trends without exporting. Ship more of this.

content: Onboarding was smooth; had my team imported in under ten minutes.

content: Support resolved my billing question same day. Polite and knew the product.

content: The CSV export includes exactly the columns we need for finance. Thank you.

content: Mobile app feels snappy now — no more frozen scroll on long threads.

content: Neutral: product is fine for basic reporting. Nothing exciting but it works.

content: Meh. Does the job. Wish there were more templates out of the box.

content: Invoice line items still wrong after the March update — finance is blocking rollout.
